summary:
Macrocephaly does not occur in FAS; it’s more commonly seen in other syndromes such as Congenital Rubella Syndrome. Other listed abnormalities can be found in Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorders including Holoprosencephaly, Microcephaly, Thinning Corpus Callosum among others making them part of its sequela but NOT MACROCEPHALY which makes this a unique case here.
